# unifi_dns_policy (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi DNS policy by `id` or `domain` within a site. Set `type` to disambiguate shared domains.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing DNS policy by domain and type.
data "unifi_site" "main" {
  name = "Default"
}

data "unifi_dns_policy" "printer" {
  site_id = data.unifi_site.main.id
  domain  = "printer.iot.internal"
  type    = "A_RECORD"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String)

### Optional

- `domain` (String)
- `type` (String)

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ip_address` (String)
- `ipv4_address` (String)
- `ipv6_address` (String)
- `mail_server_domain` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `priority` (Number)
- `protocol` (String)
- `server_domain` (String)
- `service` (String)
- `target_domain` (String)
- `text` (String)
- `ttl_seconds` (Number)
- `weight` (Number)
